title: Event Dispatcher & Script Execution

classes.name: Event
methods: + __construct(name: string, args: array = [], flags: array = []): void

classes.name: EventDispatcher
methods: + __construct(composer: PartialComposer, io: IOInterface, process: ?ProcessExecutor = null): void
+ dispatchScript(eventName: string, devMode: bool = false, additionalArgs: array = [], flags: array = []): int
+ dispatchPackageEvent(eventName: string, devMode: bool, localRepo: RepositoryInterface, operations: OperationInterface[], operation: OperationInterface): int
+ dispatchInstallerEvent(eventName: string, devMode: bool, executeOperations: bool, transaction: Transaction): int
# executeEventPhpScript(className: string, methodName: string, event: Event): mixed
+ addListener(eventName: string, listener: callable|string, priority: int = 0): void

classes.name: Event
methods: + __construct(name: string, composer: Composer, io: IOInterface, devMode: bool = false, args: array = [], flags: array = []): void
classes.notes: setOriginatingEvent traverses chain to find the top-most origin via calculateOriginatingEvent (recursive)

classes.name: ScriptEvents
classes.notes: Pure constants class — string event name registry for script lifecycle hooks

relationships: EventDispatcher depends_on Event (dispatch, doDispatch, getListeners, pushEvent)
EventDispatcher depends_on ScriptExecutionException (throws on non-zero exit)
ScriptEvents is_used_by EventDispatcher (event name constants passed to dispatch/dispatchScript)
key_dispatch_flow: dispatchScript(eventName, devMode, args, flags) → new Script\Event(...) → doDispatch(event)
doDispatch: getListeners(event) → pushEvent → foreach listener: [callable|phpScript|composerScript|commandClass|shellScript] → popEvent
PHP script (Class::method): makeAutoloader → executeEventPhpScript(className, methodName, event)
composer script (@scriptName): new ScriptEvent → setOriginatingEvent → dispatch(scriptName, scriptEvent) [recursive]
@composer script: executeTty(phpExecCommand + COMPOSER_BINARY + args) — throws ScriptExecutionException on non-zero exit
command class (FooCommand): new Application → addCommand → app.run(StringInput)
shell script: executeTty(exec) — throws ScriptExecutionException on non-zero exit
important_notes: EventDispatcher.runScripts controls whether composer.json 'scripts' are included as listeners
COMPOSER_SKIP_SCRIPTS env var populates skipScripts list to suppress specific script events
Circular event references detected in pushEvent via eventStack stack
makeAutoloader regenerates ClassLoader when package set changes (hash-based caching)
doDispatch restores pre-event autoloader order in finally block
Script\Event.setOriginatingEvent recursively unwraps event chains to store top-most origin
ScriptEvents constants are only string values — no methods or logic
